name: Linux
summary: Open source Unix-like OS kernel. Monolithic. ~98% servers. Cgroups, namespaces → Docker/Kubernetes.

facts.text: monolithic kernel: device drivers trong kernel space
cgroups: resource limits cho process groups — Docker dùng
namespaces: isolate PID, network, mount — container primitives
everything is a file: /proc, /sys, devices, sockets
